title: Christmas Star Shape Charger Plates, Festive Party Plates, Metallic Red, Silver, Gold - 31x30CM, Set of 4 (Gold)
features: FESTIVE DESIGN: Star-shaped charger plates perfect for Christmas table settings, featuring elegant metallic finishes in silver, red, and gold colours
PREMIUM MATERIAL: Crafted from durable polypropylene with a lustrous metallic finish that adds sophistication to your dining presentation
VERSATILE SIZE: Each charger plate measures 31 x 30 centimetres, providing an ideal backdrop for standard dinner plates and holiday servingware
COMPLETE SET: Includes 4 coordinating metallic charger plates that can be mixed and matched for various table arrangements. Choose from red, silver & gold
EASY MAINTENANCE: Lightweight and simple to clean, these charger plates are practical for both special occasions and everyday dining
description: Transform your holiday table settings with these stunning star-shaped charger plates from Envenzo. This set of 4 decorative chargers features elegant metallic finishes in silver, red, and gold, adding a magical festive touch to your Christmas dining experience. Each charger measures 31x30 centimetres, providing the perfect backdrop for your dinner plates while creating a sophisticated layered look. Crafted from durable polypropylene with a lustrous metallic finish, these chargers combine style with practicality. The unique star design offers a contemporary twist on traditional round chargers, making them ideal for Christmas dinners, holiday parties, and special winter celebrations. The versatile colour combination allows you to mix and match or coordinate with your existing tableware and decorations. These statement pieces will elevate your table presentation and create a memorable dining atmosphere for your guests.
